top_signals.title: Convicted FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried files formal request for Trump pardon
top_signals.summary: The co-founder of the now defunct FTX crypto exchange is currently serving a 25-year federal prison sentence.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says sovereign AI is Nvidia's powerful new growth driver

top_signals.title: WestJet Slams Canada’s Loan Offer to Airlines Hit by Fuel Costs
top_signals.summary: WestJet Airlines Ltd. condemned the Canadian government’s offer of loans to help carriers hit by high jet fuel costs in the wake of the closing of the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: French Army has recruitment surplus but lacks equipment, deputy chief says
top_signals.summary: “This year, we’re already slowing down recruitment because not only are we recruiting better, but we’re retaining people better," a service leader said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Foreign investors have dumped billions of dollars of Korean stocks this year despite record rally. Here's why
top_signals.summary: The selling intensified Monday as the benchmark Kospi plunged more than 8% at the open, even as it emerged as one of the world's standout performers thus far.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
top_signals.summary: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.
